plugins.name: claudio
plugins.description: Makes Claude a better developer: enforces a strict coding standard, runs a post-implementation quality gate, reviews branch-only diffs, responds to PR/MR review threads, and maintains a ~/.claudio knowledge base of analyzed repos.

plugins.name: megaphone
plugins.description: Sends you native desktop notifications (with a custom icon and per-category sounds) when Claude finishes, errors, needs attention, or asks permission — by default only when you're not looking at the session, and clicking a notification jumps back to the session. Works on macOS, Windows, and Linux.
